title: Month of May and Sound System Donation
body:
Generous Donation Recieved

We are delighted to share that our Parish has recieved a geneorous donation via Gift aid of £5000 from a couple, dedicated to upgrading our sound system. This gift will cover the essential must-have improvements. We still need £2000 for a hearing loop system; safety rack; additional microphones and other improvements. Every gift large or small makes a difference. If you are a UK tax payer, please use the form below to gift aid the donation and make it go further at no extra cost to you. Together, we can ensure that every voice is heard and every word builds our faith family.

Hello May - Month of Mary

Hello May –Month of Mary Throughout the month of May, the Rosary will be prayed every Tuesday at 9:45 am in place of Morning Prayer. All are warmly invited to join us in honouring Our Lady during this special month of devotion.
